title: Preta-Siddhi — Field Manual
description: A complete field manual for preta-saṁvāda (spirit communication) drawn from Aghora and Kaula tantric sources. Includes preparatory bhūta-śuddhi rites, the Preta-Sandhi Yantra with geometric proportions, the Chakra-Maṇḍala layout, the seven diagnostic Prashna sequence, and the Preta-Mukti Kriyā liberation rite. Preserved as scholarly source material only.
